feat.effect: You Interact to draw a gauntlet bow, hand crossbow, or repeating hand crossbow, then Strike with it. Alternatively, you can Strike with a loaded hand crossbow  or repeating hand crossbow you're already holding and then Interact to stow it.
feat.name: Crossbow Infiltrator Dedication
feat.text:
You have mastered stealthy weapons that allow you to strike carefully from a distance far enough to avoid reprisal, yet close enough to confirm your kills. You have familiarity with the gauntlet bow, hand crossbow, and repeating hand crossbow, treating the repeating hand crossbow as a martial weapon for the purposes of proficiency and the gauntlet bow as a simple weapon for the purposes of proficiency. If you're at least an expert in any of these weapons, you gain access to that weapon's critical specialization effect. You also gain the Infiltrator's Draw action.   
  
**Infiltrator's Draw**

traits.name: Archetype
traits.text: This feat belongs to an archetype.

traits.name: Dedication
traits.text: Each archetype’s dedication feat represents your character’s dedicated effort learning a new set of abilities, making it impossible to split your focus and pursue another archetype at the same time. Once you take a dedication feat, you can’t select a different dedication feat until you complete your dedication by taking two other feats from your current archetype. You can’t retrain a dedication feat as long as you have any other feats from that archetype.
